hero.title: Junior Backend Developer
hero.subtitle: I build scalable APIs and robust backend systems with modern technologies. Passionate about clean architecture and well-crafted code.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a junior backend developer with experience building REST APIs, ERP integrations, and process automation. I work with technologies like Node.js, NestJS, Python, and FastAPI, and have experience with Docker deployments and cloud services.
about.p2: I currently work as a Developer Junior at LatamReady S.R.L., where I perform NetSuite ERP integrations and develop electronic invoicing solutions for the Spanish and Colombian markets.

experience.title: Experience
experience.job1_desc: NetSuite ERP integrations, electronic invoicing development for Spain and Colombia, REST API creation documented with Swagger.
experience.job2_desc: Web scraping with Python to extract INDECOPI data, data migration and transformation, Excel report generation.
experience.edu_company: Universidad Nacional Tecnológica de Lima Sur (UNTELS)
experience.edu_desc: Training in software engineering, databases, networks, and technology project management.
